description: Per-role draft for one iteration. `rules` defaults to an empty array — use sparingly.

actions.description: Ordered list of concrete actions this role will perform.

id.description: <task_id>.<role_tag>.<n> — the task id this action implements, your role_tag, and a per-action <n> starting at 1 inside each task.

action.description: Imperative prose describing the concrete change to build.

depends.description: Other action ids this action depends on.

verify.description: Observable assertions that must hold once the action's output is in place — one per line. Omit entirely for non-runnable artifacts.

rules.description: Rule proposals for the role. Use sparingly.

actions.action: Add the responsive page shell to index.html: meta viewport, full-viewport flex container, and a centred .canvas div sized via min(80vw, 80vh).
actions.verify:
Loading index.html shows a centred .canvas sized via min(80vw, 80vh).
Resizing the window keeps the canvas centred and proportional.

actions.action: Implement the atmospheric layer in index.html <style>: a .sun block with radial gradient and three .cloud elements with an @keyframes drift loop.
actions.verify:
Sun and three clouds render inside .canvas.
Cloud .drift animation runs without console errors.

rules.proposal: Every CSS animation block is wrapped in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference).
alternatives: All animations gated by a single :root custom property; toggle from one place.
